label: Australian unit costs for outcome monetisation in programme evaluation and CBA
note: Compiled from Productivity Commission Report on Government Services (RoGS 2026), IHACPA National Efficient Price, AIHW health expenditure data, and AIC crime costs. State-by-state breakdowns available for most metrics. Values are national averages unless specified.

government_school_per_student.description: Recurrent cost per FTE student in government schools (including user cost of capital).

non_government_school_per_student.description: Recurrent cost per FTE student in non-government schools (excluding user cost of capital).

hospital_cost_per_weighted_separation.description: Recurrent cost per National Weighted Activity Unit (NWAU) separation in public hospitals.

hospital_capital_per_weighted_separation.description: Capital cost per weighted separation (excluding land).

national_efficient_price_per_nwau.description: IHACPA National Efficient Price for 2025-26. This is the benchmark price for hospital funding.

ed_presentation.description: Cost per non-admitted emergency department presentation.

non_admitted_service_event.description: Cost per non-admitted service event (outpatient equivalent).

ambulance_per_person.description: Total ambulance expenditure per head of population.

health_expenditure_per_person.description: Total health expenditure per person (all sources: government, private, out-of-pocket).

police_expenditure_per_person.description: National average recurrent police expenditure per head of population.

prison_per_day.description: Total recurrent expenditure per prisoner per day (including capital costs).

homicide_cost.description: Estimated total cost of a homicide (AIC 2003 estimate, inflated to 2024-25 prices). Includes: victim harm, lost productivity, criminal justice, emergency response.
homicide_cost.source: AIC (2003, inflated). CAUTION: severely outdated base estimate.
homicide_cost.inflation_note: Original AIC estimate ~AUD 1.6m in 2003 dollars. Inflated by CPI (~1.55x).

assault_cost.description: AIC estimated cost per assault incident (inflated from 2003).
assault_cost.source: AIC (2003, inflated). Use with strong caveats.

burglary_cost.description: AIC estimated cost per burglary (inflated from 2003).
burglary_cost.source: AIC (2003, inflated). Use with strong caveats.

domestic_family_violence_total_annual.description: Total estimated annual cost of violence against women and their children. Not a per-incident cost.

public_housing_per_dwelling_incl_ucc.description: Including user cost of capital (reflecting the opportunity cost of the housing asset).

somih_per_dwelling_incl_ucc.description: State Owned and Managed Indigenous Housing, including user cost of capital.

cost_per_notification_investigated.description: Cost per child protection notification investigated. Wide range across jurisdictions.

oohc_per_placement_night.description: Out-of-home care cost per placement night (national, excluding QLD).

oohc_non_residential_annual.description: Annual cost per child in non-residential out-of-home care (foster care, kinship care).

oohc_residential_annual.description: Annual cost per child in residential care. Extremely expensive due to intensive staffing requirements.

child_protection_expenditure_per_child_0.description: Total child protection expenditure divided by population aged 0-17.

detention_per_day.description: Cost per young person per day in detention. Enormous variation across jurisdictions.

community_supervision_per_day.description: Community-based supervision cost per day (excluding NT).

chsp_per_recipient_annual.description: Commonwealth Home Support Programme cost per recipient.

ndis_average_per_participant.description: Estimated average NDIS payment per participant (AUD 41.8bn / ~660k participants).

implied_cost_per_fire_incident.description: Calculated: total expenditure / total incidents. Rough average including false alarms and non-fire responses.

source.primary: Productivity Commission, Report on Government Services 2026 (RoGS)
supplementary: AIC Cost of Crime estimates (2003, inflated)
KPMG/ANROWS violence against women cost estimates
